identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Tactical Noir' gaming platform that feels like a piece of high-end military tech or a secret society interface. No generic SaaS vibes.

theme.name: Tactical Noir (Monochrome Cyberpunk)
theme.philosophy: Color is for information, not decoration. The aesthetic comes from contrast, texture, and light.

grid_system.shop: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-8
grid_system.bento_rules: Use col-span-full for heroes, col-span-6 for major widgets, col-span-4 or 3 for stats.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-bold font-orbitron hover:bg-gray-200 hover:scale-[1.02] transition-all duration-200 rounded-none clip-path-polygon-[0_0,100%_0,100%_80%,90%_100%,0_100%]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white hover:text-white hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.default: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md hover:border-white/40 transition-colors duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-b border-white/20 focus:border-white focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 transition-all font-rajdhani

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6
navigation.link: text-sm font-orbitron text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:-bottom-1 after:left-0 after:w-0 after:h-[1px] after:bg-white hover:after:w-full after:transition-all

visual_enhancers.scanlines: Optional overlay pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 bg-[linear-gradient(rgba(18,16,16,0)_50%,rgba(0,0,0,0.25)_50%),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,0,0,0.06),rgba(0,255,0,0.02),rgba(0,0,255,0.06))] z-[100] bg-[length:100%_2px,3px_100%] pointer-events-none opacity-20
visual_enhancers.noise: Add a subtle noise texture to the background #050505.

images.description: Abstract white dots on black, suitable for hero background or parallax layer
Circular HUD element, good for profile or loading states
Wavy lines, good for section breaks or footer background

login.layout: Split screen. Left: 3D interactive element or large abstract typography 'SUKUNA'. Right: Minimal login form.
login.special: Input fields should feel like entering a command code.

dodge_game.ui: HUD style overlay for score and coins. No standard buttons.

shop.grid: Grid of cards. Each card reveals 'Purchase' button on hover with a glitch effect.
shop.items: Use abstract icons for 'Custom Role', 'Gradient', etc.

admin.style: High density data table. Monospace fonts for data.
admin.features: Add Coins, Ban User buttons in red/white outline.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid black #050505 or #0A0A0A.
Text must be READABLE. Contrast ratio > 4.5:1.
Animations should be snappy (0.2s) or very slow (20s for background drift).
No rounded corners > 4px. Prefer sharp 0px or small 2px rounding.
Implement a 'Scanline' toggle if possible for extra retro feel.
For the user 'pseudotamine', show a special 'ADMIN' badge in the UI.
